chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc: Application No.S-31 of 2026 “Liaquat Ali versus Muhammad Yousuf & others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G a/w police official. Mr. Bhoro Bheel advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1 and detenue. = From the facts produced by the respondent’s counsel and the statement filed along with the order of the learned Family Court, whereby the marriage between the applicant and the alleged detenue has been declared dissolved by way of Khula, it appears that the applicant has lost his status and rights as husband of the detenue and is not competent to question or pursue the present application. Therefore, no case of illegal detention has been made out, and the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as being devoid of merits. The learned counsel for the applicant is directed to approach the appropriate forum, if so advised, with regard to reconciliation between the parties. The instant application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
